TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: gaga psani ' skura yow na gaga h'ilan te utux, piyux wa mhoyin utux alang ga, siga musa hkani binah na kki'an utux alang naha. te saying mhoyin cyoli' haca ga hala hm'un ryax haca, ini hngu'un laga, mulu ya'ih yow, kyaku gbyan hnu'yil ga si ga hng'un sasan cugan. te tugal hn'ilan Sali, siga mbahing utux Sali, tugan ryax ini htuw tanux musa mtiyow, ini usa mluyak rgyax uy.
S.PHON: …£a…£a ps~…ēani Ē s~…ēkura jow na …£a…£a ńß Ēilan te utux, pijux wa mńßojin utux alaŇč …£a, s~…ēi…£a mus~…ēa ńßkani ő≤inańß na kki Ēan utux alaŇč nańßa. te s~…ēajiŇč mńßojin ¶~ ®joli Ē ńßa ¶~ ®a …£a ńßala ńßm Ēun rjax ńßa ¶~ ®a, ini ńßŇču Ēun la…£a, mulu ja Ēińß jow, kjaku …£ő≤jan ńßnu Ējil …£a s~…ēi …£a ńßŇč Ēun s~…ēas~…ēan ¶~ ®u…£an. te tu…£al ńßn Ēilan s~…ēali, s~…ēi…£a mő≤ańßiŇč utux s~…ēali, tu…£an rjax ini ńßtuw tanux mus~…ēa mtijow, ini us~…ēa mlujak r…£jax uj.
S.FORM: gaga psani ' skura yow na gaga h'ilan te utux, piyux wa mhoyin utux alang ga, siga musa hkani binah na kki'an utux alang naha. te saying mhoyin cyoli' haca ga hala hm'un ryax haca, ini hngu'un laga, mulu ya'ih yow, kyaku gbyan hnu'yil ga si ga hng'un sasan cugan. te tugal hn'ilan Sali, siga mbahing utux Sali, tugan ryax ini htuw tanux musa mtiyow, ini usa mluyak rgyax uy.
